name: Double Chocolate Cereal Treats
recipeIngredient: 1 cup milk chocolate or peanut butter chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a square pan, 9x9x2 inches.
2. Heat the corn syrup and chocolate chips in a saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly, until the chips are melted.
3. Stir in the cereal until it is evenly coated.
4. Press the mixture into the pan using the back of a spoon.
5. Cool completely.
6. Cut into about 2 1/4 x 1 1/2 inch bars.
7. Yields 2 dozen bars.
